name: codex-conductor
description: Coordinate Codex projects, threads, and worker sessions with a small CLI and companion skills.

interface.shortDescription: Coordinate Codex projects and worker threads.
interface.longDescription: Codex Conductor bundles a local CLI, focused Codex skills, and a UserPromptSubmit hook for project-scoped thread orchestration, worker dispatch, status collection, and result synthesis inside Codex App sessions.
defaultPrompt: Use Codex Conductor to split this task into worker threads.
Show the active project and collect worker results.
Create a project-scoped dispatch plan for this goal.
